TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 1. O tato'asan no Fata'an == I ti:yaho, O Helam tamdaw ho mikowannay to Taywan. Ira to ko Fata'a niyaro'ato Tafalong . dodo'sato tangasa itini i ka Holam hongti,saka tosapolo' a mihca'an(1894). kingsifo no Posong matilid to i cudad ko pi'asip nganra to Fata'an , polong laloma'an, sepat li'an ira ko tosa polo' to sepat, polong tamdaw ira ko tosa pa'tk ira ko 'nem polo'to lima. Tafalong,polong laloma'an,tosali'an ira ko sepat polo' to pito, polong tamdaw cecay pa'tk ira ko pito li'an irako tolo polo'to pito.yo,i itiya O tatapang'an no sarikec no Fata'an taha matini i o ni'an saka; Sapalengau,Afudoay papeluay Sikawasay. sanay ko laylay,serangawan no Fata'an. 2. O laylay na fata'an(sinafer) I ti:yaho mapa sari'pa no matoa'say ko sera' no Fata'an niyaro'. sil'sil sako lengaw no fata'an. a malofic ko heci no fata'an 'tatodong masa kakita'an ko paro' no loma'ato finawlam sa'an ko sowal no matoa'say. nai tiya 'a'aparo:ma' ko laloma'an no fata'an i pala omah ato liyoliyok no loma. 3. O ilisin no Fata'an I 'ayaw no iilisin mapatakus to ko Icowacowa'ay a ngangasawan no Fata'an a tamdaw. saka falo' no fulad a mihca'an ko kalikuda'an no niyaro'. polong a'nem ko romi'ad; saka cecay a romi'ad; mapolong ko fucingkay i sulalatang a misanga to 'pah. pakalongay a kapah minanam to tatoa'san a kimad saka i'cel to orip. saka tosa a romi'ad; mapolong ko pakalongay a kapah, ma polong macakat i tatapang'an no Fata'an a lotok Masisan. saka tolo a romi'ad; 1.mapolong a masaawid'awid pangangan i kalikuda'an a putal. misanga' to polong no talo'an. masasi'araw ko misa'awid'awiday. saka sepat a romi'ad; misatapang to ilisin,misakawas ko sikawasay to orip namihca'an. mipi'say to pana'idoc. mipi'say to sakero'ato minengneng to iti:yaho a sasing. mapolong a malikuda to dadaya. saka lima a romi'ad; malaholo:holo ko'awid'awid. mipi'say to macowa:cowa'ay 'ondo ato radiw no tatoa'san. saka lafi paka'en to matoa'say,kalas ato tayni'ay a lafang. O kalikuda'an no kapah awid. saka 'nem a romi'ad; mipi'say totatoa'san a kero'ato malikuda. mipi'say to macowacowa'ay a kimad no loma'. saikor a malikuda,O sapaini to wa'ay fafahi a kapah, kayoing fafahiyan ci pikaput to likuda, itra sai liyok a minengneng ami tapal to kaolah'an nengra. ama tama' nira ko kaolah nira so'rot han nira ko alofu nora kapah todong ci faloco'ciira'an, sanay ko dmak kina imi'. 4. O sowal no matoa'say O sari'kec no pang'cah i,O paka ina'ay. hay,maleku, ko finawlam a sa'an. itiya tala ayaw ci lamod ko kapah pasifana'aca ko matoa'say to fainayan a kapah to palakaw ato mifuting mikasoy ato mifalot to kasoy misanga to sa'asik ato rakar. mafana misanga' to adipal liyok no loma. kayoing sa'an a minanam ami saturon ato mikanit to fudoy ato misanga to'pah. == 5. O awid no Fata'an ==
S.PHON: == *. o~u tato~uʡasan no~u fataʡan == i ti:jaħo~u, o~u ħəɾam tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~u miko~uwannaj to~u tajwan. ira to~u ko~u fataʡa nijaro~uʡato~u tafaɾo~uŋ . ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡsato~u taŋasa itini i ka ħo~uɾam ħo~uŋti,saka to~usapo~uɾo~uʡ a miħʦaʡan(****). kiŋsifo~u no~u po~uso~uŋ matiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u i ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ko~u piʡasip ŋanra to~u fataʡan , po~uɾo~uŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan, səpat ɾiʡan ira ko~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ to~u səpat, po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u to~usa paʡtk ira ko~u ʡnəm po~uɾo~uʡto~u ɾima. tafaɾo~uŋ,po~uɾo~uŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan,to~usaɾiʡan ira ko~u səpat po~uɾo~uʡ to~u pito~u, po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦəʦaj paʡtk ira ko~u pito~u ɾiʡan irako~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡto~u pito~u.jo~u,i itija o~u tatapaŋʡan no~u sarikəʦ no~u fataʡan taħa matini i o~u niʡan saka; sapaɾəŋao~u~u,afo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uaj papəɾo~u~uaj sikawasaj. sanaj ko~u ɾajɾaj,səraŋawan no~u fataʡan. *. o~u ɾajɾaj na fataʡan(sinafər) i ti:jaħo~u mapa sariʡpa no~u mato~uaʡsaj ko~u səraʡ no~u fataʡan nijaro~uʡ. siɾʡsiɾ sako~u ɾəŋaw no~u fataʡan. a maɾo~ufiʦ ko~u ħəʦi no~u fataʡan ʡtato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ masa kakitaʡan ko~u paro~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡato~u finawɾam saʡan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uaʡsaj. nai tija ʡaʡaparo~u:maʡ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u fataʡan i paɾa o~umaħ ato~u ɾijo~uɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~uma. *. o~u iɾisin no~u fataʡan i ʡajaw no~u iiɾisin mapatako~u~us to~u ko~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaʡaj a ŋaŋasawan no~u fataʡan a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka faɾo~uʡ no~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ a miħʦaʡan ko~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. po~uɾo~uŋ aʡnəm ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; saka ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u fo~u~uʦiŋkaj i so~u~uɾaɾataŋ a misaŋa to~u ʡpaħ. pakaɾo~uŋaj a kapaħ minanam to~u tato~uaʡsan a kimaɬ~ɮ saka iʡʦəɾ to~u o~urip. saka to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u pakaɾo~uŋaj a kapaħ, ma po~uɾo~uŋ maʦakat i tatapaŋʡan no~u fataʡan a ɾo~uto~uk masisan. saka to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; *.mapo~uɾo~uŋ a masaawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮ paŋaŋan i kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan a po~u~utaɾ. misaŋaʡ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u taɾo~uʡan. masasiʡaraw ko~u misaʡawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮaj. saka səpat a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; misatapaŋ to~u iɾisin,misakawas ko~u sikawasaj to~u o~urip namiħʦaʡan. mipiʡsaj to~u panaʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ. mipiʡsaj to~u sakəro~uʡato~u minəŋnəŋ to~u iti:jaħo~u a sasiŋ. mapo~uɾo~uŋ a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. saka ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; maɾaħo~uɾo~u:ħo~uɾo~u ko~uʡawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮ. mipiʡsaj to~u maʦo~uwa:ʦo~uwaʡaj ʡo~unɬ~ɮo~u ato~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u tato~uaʡsan. saka ɾafi pakaʡən to~u mato~uaʡsaj,kaɾas ato~u tajniʡaj a ɾafaŋ. o~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan no~u kapaħ awiɬ~ɮ. saka ʡnəm a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mipiʡsaj to~utato~uaʡsan a kəro~uʡato~u maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa. mipiʡsaj to~u maʦo~uwaʦo~uwaʡaj a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saiko~ur a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa,o~u sapaini to~u waʡaj fafaħi a kapaħ, kajo~uiŋ fafaħijan ʦi pikapo~u~ut to~u ɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa, itra sai ɾijo~uk a minəŋnəŋ ami tapaɾ to~u kao~uɾaħʡan nəŋra. ama tamaʡ nira ko~u kao~uɾaħ nira so~uʡro~ut ħan nira ko~u aɾo~ufo~u~u no~ura kapaħ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡʦiiraʡan, sanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮmak kina imiʡ. *. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uaʡsaj o~u sariʡkəʦ no~u paŋʡʦaħ i,o~u paka inaʡaj. ħaj,maɾəko~u~u, ko~u finawɾam a saʡan. itija taɾa ajaw ʦi ɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kapaħ pasifanaʡaʦa ko~u mato~uaʡsaj to~u fainajan a kapaħ to~u paɾakaw ato~u mifo~u~utiŋ mikaso~uj ato~u mifaɾo~ut to~u kaso~uj misaŋa to~u saʡasik ato~u rakar. mafana misaŋaʡ to~u aɬ~ɮipaɾ ɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~uma. kajo~uiŋ saʡan a minanam ami sato~u~uro~un ato~u mikanit to~u fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uj ato~u misaŋa to~uʡpaħ. == *. o~u awiɬ~ɮ no~u fataʡan ==
S.FORM: == 1. O tato'asan no Fata'an == I ti:yaho, O Helam tamdaw ho mikowannay to Taywan. Ira to ko Fata'a niyaro'ato Tafalong . dodo'sato tangasa itini i ka Holam hongti,saka tosapolo' a mihca'an(1894). kingsifo no Posong matilid to i cudad ko pi'asip nganra to Fata'an , polong laloma'an, sepat li'an ira ko tosa polo' to sepat, polong tamdaw ira ko tosa pa'tk ira ko 'nem polo'to lima. Tafalong,polong laloma'an,tosali'an ira ko sepat polo' to pito, polong tamdaw cecay pa'tk ira ko pito li'an irako tolo polo'to pito.yo,i itiya O tatapang'an no sarikec no Fata'an taha matini i o ni'an saka; Sapalengau,Afudoay papeluay Sikawasay. sanay ko laylay,serangawan no Fata'an. 2. O laylay na fata'an(sinafer) I ti:yaho mapa sari'pa no matoa'say ko sera' no Fata'an niyaro'. sil'sil sako lengaw no fata'an. a malofic ko heci no fata'an 'tatodong masa kakita'an ko paro' no loma'ato finawlam sa'an ko sowal no matoa'say. nai tiya 'a'aparo:ma' ko laloma'an no fata'an i pala omah ato liyoliyok no loma. 3. O ilisin no Fata'an I 'ayaw no iilisin mapatakus to ko Icowacowa'ay a ngangasawan no Fata'an a tamdaw. saka falo' no fulad a mihca'an ko kalikuda'an no niyaro'. polong a'nem ko romi'ad; saka cecay a romi'ad; mapolong ko fucingkay i sulalatang a misanga to 'pah. pakalongay a kapah minanam to tatoa'san a kimad saka i'cel to orip. saka tosa a romi'ad; mapolong ko pakalongay a kapah, ma polong macakat i tatapang'an no Fata'an a lotok Masisan. saka tolo a romi'ad; 1.mapolong a masaawid'awid pangangan i kalikuda'an a putal. misanga' to polong no talo'an. masasi'araw ko misa'awid'awiday. saka sepat a romi'ad; misatapang to ilisin,misakawas ko sikawasay to orip namihca'an. mipi'say to pana'idoc. mipi'say to sakero'ato minengneng to iti:yaho a sasing. mapolong a malikuda to dadaya. saka lima a romi'ad; malaholo:holo ko'awid'awid. mipi'say to macowa:cowa'ay 'ondo ato radiw no tatoa'san. saka lafi paka'en to matoa'say,kalas ato tayni'ay a lafang. O kalikuda'an no kapah awid. saka 'nem a romi'ad; mipi'say totatoa'san a kero'ato malikuda. mipi'say to macowacowa'ay a kimad no loma'. saikor a malikuda,O sapaini to wa'ay fafahi a kapah, kayoing fafahiyan ci pikaput to likuda, itra sai liyok a minengneng ami tapal to kaolah'an nengra. ama tama' nira ko kaolah nira so'rot han nira ko alofu nora kapah todong ci faloco'ciira'an, sanay ko dmak kina imi'. 4. O sowal no matoa'say O sari'kec no pang'cah i,O paka ina'ay. hay,maleku, ko finawlam a sa'an. itiya tala ayaw ci lamod ko kapah pasifana'aca ko matoa'say to fainayan a kapah to palakaw ato mifuting mikasoy ato mifalot to kasoy misanga to sa'asik ato rakar. mafana misanga' to adipal liyok no loma. kayoing sa'an a minanam ami saturon ato mikanit to fudoy ato misanga to'pah. == 5. O awid no Fata'an ==
S.PHON: == *. o~u tato~uʡasan no~u fataʡan == i ti:jaħo~u, o~u ħəɾam tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~u miko~uwannaj to~u tajwan. ira to~u ko~u fataʡa nijaro~uʡato~u tafaɾo~uŋ . ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡsato~u taŋasa itini i ka ħo~uɾam ħo~uŋti,saka to~usapo~uɾo~uʡ a miħʦaʡan(****). kiŋsifo~u no~u po~uso~uŋ matiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u i ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ko~u piʡasip ŋanra to~u fataʡan , po~uɾo~uŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan, səpat ɾiʡan ira ko~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ to~u səpat, po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u to~usa paʡtk ira ko~u ʡnəm po~uɾo~uʡto~u ɾima. tafaɾo~uŋ,po~uɾo~uŋ ɾaɾo~umaʡan,to~usaɾiʡan ira ko~u səpat po~uɾo~uʡ to~u pito~u, po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦəʦaj paʡtk ira ko~u pito~u ɾiʡan irako~u to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡto~u pito~u.jo~u,i itija o~u tatapaŋʡan no~u sarikəʦ no~u fataʡan taħa matini i o~u niʡan saka; sapaɾəŋao~u~u,afo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uaj papəɾo~u~uaj sikawasaj. sanaj ko~u ɾajɾaj,səraŋawan no~u fataʡan. *. o~u ɾajɾaj na fataʡan(sinafər) i ti:jaħo~u mapa sariʡpa no~u mato~uaʡsaj ko~u səraʡ no~u fataʡan nijaro~uʡ. siɾʡsiɾ sako~u ɾəŋaw no~u fataʡan. a maɾo~ufiʦ ko~u ħəʦi no~u fataʡan ʡtato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ masa kakitaʡan ko~u paro~uʡ no~u ɾo~umaʡato~u finawɾam saʡan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uaʡsaj. nai tija ʡaʡaparo~u:maʡ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u fataʡan i paɾa o~umaħ ato~u ɾijo~uɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~uma. *. o~u iɾisin no~u fataʡan i ʡajaw no~u iiɾisin mapatako~u~us to~u ko~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaʡaj a ŋaŋasawan no~u fataʡan a tamɬ~ɮaw. saka faɾo~uʡ no~u fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ a miħʦaʡan ko~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. po~uɾo~uŋ aʡnəm ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; saka ʦəʦaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u fo~u~uʦiŋkaj i so~u~uɾaɾataŋ a misaŋa to~u ʡpaħ. pakaɾo~uŋaj a kapaħ minanam to~u tato~uaʡsan a kimaɬ~ɮ saka iʡʦəɾ to~u o~urip. saka to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u pakaɾo~uŋaj a kapaħ, ma po~uɾo~uŋ maʦakat i tatapaŋʡan no~u fataʡan a ɾo~uto~uk masisan. saka to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; *.mapo~uɾo~uŋ a masaawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮ paŋaŋan i kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan a po~u~utaɾ. misaŋaʡ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u taɾo~uʡan. masasiʡaraw ko~u misaʡawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮaj. saka səpat a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; misatapaŋ to~u iɾisin,misakawas ko~u sikawasaj to~u o~urip namiħʦaʡan. mipiʡsaj to~u panaʡiɬ~ɮo~uʦ. mipiʡsaj to~u sakəro~uʡato~u minəŋnəŋ to~u iti:jaħo~u a sasiŋ. mapo~uɾo~uŋ a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. saka ɾima a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; maɾaħo~uɾo~u:ħo~uɾo~u ko~uʡawiɬ~ɮʡawiɬ~ɮ. mipiʡsaj to~u maʦo~uwa:ʦo~uwaʡaj ʡo~unɬ~ɮo~u ato~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u tato~uaʡsan. saka ɾafi pakaʡən to~u mato~uaʡsaj,kaɾas ato~u tajniʡaj a ɾafaŋ. o~u kaɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮaʡan no~u kapaħ awiɬ~ɮ. saka ʡnəm a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ; mipiʡsaj to~utato~uaʡsan a kəro~uʡato~u maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa. mipiʡsaj to~u maʦo~uwaʦo~uwaʡaj a kimaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ. saiko~ur a maɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa,o~u sapaini to~u waʡaj fafaħi a kapaħ, kajo~uiŋ fafaħijan ʦi pikapo~u~ut to~u ɾiko~u~uɬ~ɮa, itra sai ɾijo~uk a minəŋnəŋ ami tapaɾ to~u kao~uɾaħʡan nəŋra. ama tamaʡ nira ko~u kao~uɾaħ nira so~uʡro~ut ħan nira ko~u aɾo~ufo~u~u no~ura kapaħ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi faɾo~uʦo~uʡʦiiraʡan, sanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮmak kina imiʡ. *. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uaʡsaj o~u sariʡkəʦ no~u paŋʡʦaħ i,o~u paka inaʡaj. ħaj,maɾəko~u~u, ko~u finawɾam a saʡan. itija taɾa ajaw ʦi ɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kapaħ pasifanaʡaʦa ko~u mato~uaʡsaj to~u fainajan a kapaħ to~u paɾakaw ato~u mifo~u~utiŋ mikaso~uj ato~u mifaɾo~ut to~u kaso~uj misaŋa to~u saʡasik ato~u rakar. mafana misaŋaʡ to~u aɬ~ɮipaɾ ɾijo~uk no~u ɾo~uma. kajo~uiŋ saʡan a minanam ami sato~u~uro~un ato~u mikanit to~u fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~uj ato~u misaŋa to~uʡpaħ. == *. o~u awiɬ~ɮ no~u fataʡan ==
